ksa_text: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and technology choices that support data governance and analytical objectives.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of complex data structure capabilities and applications

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI capabilities, targeted usage, goals, and expected benefits and costs compared with appropriate benchmarks are understood.

top_anchors.element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.
Knowledge of complex data structure capabilities and applications

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.445) to justify inclusion for the VP AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Architecture & Analytics is not a standard competency expectation for VP AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.445) and edge-domain placement (Data Architecture & Analytics) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
